Container.Name: Stashify-Runner
Container.Overview: GPU compute runner for Stashify. Bundles Lada (mosaic removal / decensoring), SPAN 2x live-action upscaling, and NVENC encoding behind an app-agnostic HTTP API on port 8711 — the Stashify coordinator submits jobs to it, and other apps can use the same API. Media mounts are read-only; all writing happens in /scratch, which must be the SAME host dir the Stashify container mounts at /scratch.
Container.Requires: The unRAID NVIDIA Driver plugin (for the GPU). Pairs with the Stashify container.

Config.Name: Runner API Port
Config.Description: HTTP API port for job submission/status.

Config.Name: Listen Port
Config.Description: Port the runner API listens on inside the container (keep in sync with the port mapping).

Config.Name: Runner Token
Config.Description: Optional shared secret for the runner API; must match LADA_TOKEN on the Stashify container.

Config.Name: Lada Device
Config.Description: Compute device for Lada ('cuda' or 'cpu' — CPU is extremely slow).

Config.Name: NVIDIA Visible Devices
Config.Description: Which GPUs to expose (device UUID or 'all').

Config.Name: NVIDIA Driver Capabilities
Config.Description: Driver capabilities; 'video' is required for NVENC encoding.

Config.Name: Media (matches Stash /stuff)
Config.Description: Read-only source media. Mount at the SAME container path Stash and Stashify use.

Config.Name: Media (matches Stash /stuff2)
Config.Description: Read-only source media. Mount at the SAME container path Stash and Stashify use.

Config.Name: Scratch (shared with Stashify)
Config.Description: Working dir for in-flight jobs and outputs. MUST be the same host dir the Stashify container mounts at /scratch.

Config.Name: Models (persist)
Config.Description: Persists Lada/SPAN model weights across container updates.
